Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi L43 Bus Timings from Al Maryah to Qaryat Al Beri Souq

May 9, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus L43 is one of the most important routes, as it links different important stops in its route from Al Maryah to Qaryat Al Beri Souq. This guide offers a complete guide to the L43 route, from the operating hours to main stops and other important travel tips to help you enjoy a pleasant and efficient trip.

Contents

Operational Details

There is regular service on bus L43 throughout the day. Below is the detailed schedule for Bus L43, departing from both Al Maryah and Qaryat Al Beri Souq:

From Al Maryah From Qaryat Al Beri Souq
05:36 05:26
06:04 05:56
06:34 06:24
07:01 06:54
07:31 07:19
08:02 07:49
08:32 08:23
08:55 08:45
09:25 09:14
09:55 09:44
10:25 10:13
10:55 10:43
11:23 11:13
11:53 11:43
12:23 12:12
12:53 12:42
13:23 13:13
14:00 13:51
14:30 14:19
15:01 14:49
15:31 15:20
16:00 15:50
16:30 16:20
16:59 16:50
17:27 17:19
17:57 17:49
18:27 18:19
18:57 18:49
19:28 19:21
19:51 19:51
20:23 20:14
20:53 20:44
21:25 21:15
21:55 21:45
22:27 22:18
22:57 22:48
23:29 23:18

Bus L43 TimetableThe official AD Mobility website or this link for the L43 Bus Timings has the full schedule.

Ticket Pricing: Abu Dhabi’s convenient cashless payment system, Hafilat Card can be used to make payments for Bus L43. Worries that the cost of the service would be prohibitive were also addressed by the authorities when they said that AED 2 is the fare for a journey in a single zone, with AED 0.05 per kilometer for extra distance. Hafilat cards can be easily topped up online or at kiosks across the city so passengers don’t have to deal with cash and can travel seamlessly.

Route Overview

The L43 bus route covers a number of important stops beginning with retail areas, residential neighborhoods and cultural landmarks. Here’s a breakdown of the key stops along the L43 route:

  1. Al Maryah: A commercial hub home to luxury shopping and Cleveland Clinic.

  2. Cleveland Clinic: A major healthcare provider in the city.

  3. Al Reem Street: A bustling street linking residential and business areas.

  4. Abu Dhabi Mall: A popular shopping and dining destination.

5.

  1. Al Khabiyah Street: Connecting to several local neighborhoods.

  2. Fatima Bint Mubarak Street: Provides access to key cultural and commercial hubs.

  3. Al Thughour Street: A street serving residential areas.

  4. Sultan Bin Zayed The First Street: A key road in the city.

  5. Sheikh Rashid Bin Saeed Street: A central artery for the city.

  6. Etisalat: A stop for telecommunications services.

  7. Al Falah Street: A street with local services and retail shops.

  8. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street: Connecting residential and business areas.

  9. ITC Bus Depot: A major transfer point for various routes.

  10. Immigration Department: A key administrative building.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Mishrif Mall: A retail and leisure destination.

  2. Rabdan Street: Access to different parts of the city.

  3. Saif Ghobash Street: Connecting several neighborhoods.

  4. Al Noor Hospital: A healthcare facility along the route.

  5. Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque: A world-famous landmark known for its stunning architecture.

  6. Al Maqta Bus Interchange B: A key transit hub in Abu Dhabi.

  7. Healthcare Center: Serving the medical needs of the community.

  8. Coop: A shopping area catering to daily needs.

  9. Al Itihad Street: A significant street in Abu Dhabi.

  10. Street 17: A road linking different districts.

  11. Al Khor Street: Connecting residential areas.

  12. ITC: A stop near a commercial district.

  13. Qaryat Al Beri Souq: The final stop, a bustling marketplace offering local products and services.

This extensive route offers easy connection to many cultural, residential and commercial destinations. Abu Dhabi other bus routes that you may want to check out are the L42 bus route which runs from Al Maryah to Al Maqta Bus Interchange.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers on Bus L43 can conveniently access several notable attractions in Abu Dhabi:

1.

  1. Abu Dhabi Mall: A popular spot for shopping, dining, and entertainment.

  2. Mishrif Mall: Another shopping destination with a variety of shops and services.

  3. Qaryat Al Beri Souq: A charming marketplace with traditional goods and local crafts.

Journey Experience

A scenic trip through Abu Dhabi is Bus L43 from Al Maryah to Qaryat Al Beri Souq. Passengers along the way enjoy views of Electra Park and Mishrif Mall, as well as local life in residential neighborhoods.

The route finishes in the vicinity of the charming waterfront of Qaryat Al Beri Souq, where Arabian traditions and modern shopping and dining are combined together. This is a rare view of Abu Dhabi’s modernity and tradition. It’s a great way for tourists to look around the key sights of the city but without missing the culture proper. Whether for sightseeing or daily commuting the journey can be said to be among the comfortable and easy way of transportation across the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 9, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
